creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

If you’ve never been to these 3 magical places in Sarasota, Florida, you need to save this so you don't forget to check them out! 

1. Ringling Museum of Art
2. Selby Botanical Gardens
3. Marietta Museum of Art and Whimsy

#magicalplacesflorida #sarasotaflorida #museumsflorida #hiddengemsflorida #uniqueflorida

transcription.text: Come with me to three of the most magical places in Sarasota, Florida that you need to save for your next visit. Starting off strong with Selby Botanical Gardens, which is a 15-acre urban tropical garden oasis situated on Sarasota Bay. Pro tip, buy a two-dollar bag of fish food for the koi fish pond. This was my favorite part. I've never seen so many orchids in one place and there are so many beautiful walking paths and pretty places to sit and enjoy the gardens. Then we have the Ringling Museum, which will make you feel like you just stepped into a European town. The 66-acre grounds are absolutely magical with hundreds of banyan trees to explore, the Cottazon Circus Museum, an award-winning playground for kids, and of course the Art Museum itself, which holds thousands of pieces of art and antiquities dating back 4,500 years. Pro tip, go on Mondays to explore the Art Museum for free. Last but certainly not least, we have Marietta Museum of Art in Whimzee. I've lived here my whole life and only recently discovered this little hidden gem. You'll feel like you just stepped into a whimsical fairy tale while exploring the art and the magical grounds. The best part of this museum is its free admission. They only request a donation if you are so inclined to do so. Be sure to save this post and send it to someone else looking for magical places in Sarasota.
